story_overview: In a grand high-fantasy throne room, a young queen faces heavy decisions while an aging advisor offers steady guidance. Through intimate, sequential shots, the burden of rule transforms into clarity and resolve, culminating in a confident rise to leadership.
reconstruct_target:
[Person A] young woman with dark braided hair beneath an ornate gold crown wearing deep blue and gold embroidered royal robes
[Person B] elderly man with long silver-gray beard and shoulder-length silver-gray hair wearing a dark green velvet robe with gold embroidery

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: young woman with dark braided hair beneath an ornate gold crown wearing deep blue and gold embroidered royal robes; shot caption: [Person A] sits on a carved throne beside a long table, her hands near a detailed campaign map covered in tokens and banners. Jewel-toned sunlight filters through stained-glass windows across the marble floor as she studies the map with tense stillness.

global caption: [Person A]: young woman with dark braided hair beneath an ornate gold crown wearing deep blue and gold embroidered royal robes; shot caption: [Person A] leans over the campaign map with a knitted brow, her eyes shadowed with responsibility as she studies the tokens. She keeps her jaw tight, displaying a faint flicker of uncertainty while pausing above the table.

global caption: [Person A]: young woman with dark braided hair beneath an ornate gold crown wearing deep blue and gold embroidered royal robes, [Person B] elderly man with long silver-gray beard and shoulder-length silver-gray hair wearing a dark green velvet robe with gold embroidery; shot caption: [Person B] steps beside [Person A] near the carved throne and gently rests a reassuring hand on her shoulder. [Person A] lowers her gaze toward the campaign map while [Person B] maintains a calm posture under the warm torchlight.

global caption: [Person A]: young woman with dark braided hair beneath an ornate gold crown wearing deep blue and gold embroidered royal robes, [Person B] elderly man with long silver-gray beard and shoulder-length silver-gray hair wearing a dark green velvet robe with gold embroidery; shot caption: [Person A] looks up toward [Person B], her expression softening as she releases a slow breath and her shoulders ease slightly. [Person B] remains close with a steady, supportive stance under the warm torchlight.

global caption: [Person B] elderly man with long silver-gray beard and shoulder-length silver-gray hair wearing a dark green velvet robe with gold embroidery; shot caption: [Person B] faces slightly downward, his kind and steady eyes conveying patience and conviction. He speaks softly with measured calm, the camera shifting focus briefly between his eyes and his mouth as he talks.

global caption: [Person A]: young woman with dark braided hair beneath an ornate gold crown wearing deep blue and gold embroidered royal robes, shot caption: [Person A] listens intently with her hands clasped near her chest, then gives a small nod with renewed resolve. She straightens her posture as golden light warms her face, ornate crown, and embroidered robes.

global caption: [Person A]: young woman with dark braided hair beneath an ornate gold crown wearing deep blue and gold embroidered royal robes, shot caption: [Person A] rises from the carved throne, standing tall and commanding beside the strategy table, while [Person B] steps back with a proud posture. The campaign map remains open in front of her as she sets both hands on the table edge.
